---
title: "Week 2 — Tidy Data & ggplot"
subtitle: "May 25 – 29, 2026"
---

::: callout-note
**Monday is Memorial Day — no class.** Week starts Tuesday.
:::

We introduce data frames and the *grammar of graphics*. By Friday you'll be making layered plots from real data and critiquing other people's visualizations.

## Daily plan

| Date | Topic | Files |
|---|---|---|
| Mon May 25 | **No class — Memorial Day** | — |
| Tue May 26 | [Data frames · tibbles · grammar of graphics](day1-data-frames.qmd) | slides, in-class code |
| Wed May 27 | [ggplot2 basics · aesthetics · geoms](day2-ggplot-basics.qmd) | slides, in-class code |
| Thu May 28 | [Multivariable graphics · facets · scales](day3-multivariable.qmd) | slides, in-class code |
| Fri May 29 | [**Quiz 2** · graphics critique activity](day4-critique.qmd) | quiz, activity |

## Readings due this week

- Before Tue: *Data Computing* Ch 5 (§5.1–5.6) — introduction to data graphics
- Before Wed: *Data Computing* Ch 6 (§6.1–6.5) — frames, glyphs, scales, facets, layers
- Before Thu: *Data Computing* Ch 8 (§8.1–8.3) — specifying graphs, axes, labels

## Assignments due this week

- **Reading Quiz 2** — due before Tuesday's class (Canvas)
- **HW 1** — due Wed May 27, 11:59 p.m.
- **Quiz 2** — in class Friday May 29
